_comment: MARCUS — Royal League Elite Four (Rock). A per-leader copy of the Cicada leader intro (takehara_leader_intro.json), reusing the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 camera geometry verbatim so the post-scene battle still opens from the endBack:7 stage-back. Only the title/subtitle and the theme cues change: stone-break / deepslate / anvil-land / ravager-roar sell 'The Standing Mountain', with a stone block-dust burst then a crit sparkle at the zoom-in. Particles anchor off the CHALLENGER'S look frame (execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7) since this leader has no fixed uuid — best-effort placement toward where Marcus stands ~7 blocks ahead. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify + nudge the ^-offset and zoom framing at the real Royal League Elite Four hall; endBack 7 MUST stay to match the shared leader intro so the battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle block minecraft:stone ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:crit ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
